ai_services.name: OpenAI - Fortune's Kitchen

ai_services.name: Anthropic - Fortune's Kitchen
ai_services.note: Used for Claude reasoning and review steps

automation.name: Zapier - Fortune's Kitchen
automation.note: Used to trigger and receive Zapier webhook events

restaurant_apps.name: Gmail - Fortune's Kitchen
restaurant_apps.note: Watches for vendor invoices and sends approval emails

restaurant_apps.name: Google Calendar - Fortune's Kitchen
restaurant_apps.key_source: Same Google login or GCAL_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON secret

restaurant_apps.name: Google Sheets - Fortune's Kitchen
restaurant_apps.note: Used for logging invoices and workflow results

restaurant_apps.name: QuickBooks - Fortune's Kitchen
restaurant_apps.note: Used for invoice approval and record updates

webhooks.name: Daily Agenda Webhook
webhooks.note: Create Webhook node in n8n — copy URL — paste into GitHub Secret N8N_WEBHOOK_URL

webhooks.name: Zapier Inbound Webhook
webhooks.note: Create Webhook node in n8n — give URL to Zapier as destination for parsed invoice JSON

setup_order: 1. Gmail / Google — one login covers Calendar and Sheets
7. Create Daily Agenda Webhook node — copy URL to GitHub Secret N8N_WEBHOOK_URL
8. Create Zapier Inbound Webhook node — give URL to Zapier
security_rules: Never store actual API keys in this file or anywhere in GitHub
All keys stored encrypted in n8n Credentials vault only
This file maps credential names and sources only
